{past_section}{user_ctx}Produce compact revision instructions for the poet (~100–150 words). The poet is rhyme- and revision-trained: it executes precise, local edits well.

Format: numbered or bulleted list. Each item should name line(s) or rhyme position (e.g. "line 7 end-word") and the single intended fix. Group must-fix (form/rhyme/sense) before nice-to-have (texture, diction).
- Do not ask for a full poem rewrite unless unavoidable.
- Do not paste a replacement poem.
- No preamble. Actionable only.
